failed_rules.message: LoanType must be Closed End Second for 2nd Lien program
US Citizens are not eligible for Select ITIN program.
Loan amount $753,750 below minimum $4,500,001 for FICO Score 780, Primary Residence, SFR
Reserves 12 months does not meet requirement of 18 months PITIA. Note: Cash-Out proceeds may NOT be used.
Income Doc Type "Bank Stmts: 12 Mo. Personal" is not a DSCR type - Investor DSCR requires a DSCR income documentation type - FAIL
Occupancy 'Primary Residence' not eligible for Foreign National. Available: Investment Property, Second Home
US Citizens are not eligible for Foreign National program - FAIL
Income Doc Type "Bank Stmts: 12 Mo. Personal" is not a DSCR type - DSCR Supreme Program requires a DSCR income documentation type - FAIL
Income Doc Type "Bank Stmts: 12 Mo. Personal" is not a DSCR type - DSCR Multi (5-8 Units) requires a DSCR income documentation type - FAIL
Income Doc Type "Bank Stmts: 12 Mo. Personal" is not a DSCR type - Investor DSCR No Ratio requires a DSCR income documentation type - FAIL

specifications: Must identify borrower Marlene Melendez Niccum as vested party
Must identify subject property address: 5109 Green Leaf Ct, Charlotte, NC 28226
Must include complete legal description of the property
Must disclose all liens, judgments, easements, exceptions, and title requirements
Must show qualified title insurer authorized in North Carolina
Must show effective date within acceptable recency window
Must include 24-month chain of title history as required by guidelines
Must confirm preliminary title indicates final policy will be issued after funding
Must verify property vesting aligns with borrower name and purchase transaction structure
reasons_needed: Title commitment confirms ownership, lien position, and insurable interest for underwriter review
Vesting and subject property identification must align with loan file for purchase transaction
Liens and title exceptions may affect closing conditions and loan approval
24-month title history required per guidelines to review for inconsistencies or flipping activity
Preliminary title ensures final title policy coverage will be available at funding
document_requests.compliance_notes: Must be written on 2006 ALTA standard form or ALTA short form per guidelines. Title insurer must be duly authorized and licensed in North Carolina.

specifications: Must show current property owner/grantor information
Must identify subject property address: 5109 Green Leaf Ct, Charlotte, NC 28226
Must include complete legal description matching title commitment
Must show date of current ownership acquisition
Must be recorded deed showing chain of title to current owner
Must confirm property ownership for purchase transaction structure
reasons_needed: Vesting deed confirms current property ownership and seller's ability to convey title
Legal description must match title commitment and loan documents for consistency
Current ownership verification required for purchase transaction underwriting
Establishes chain of title and ownership history for title review
document_requests.compliance_notes: Must be properly recorded deed showing current vesting. Required as part of title commitment review process.

specifications: Must be current and unexpired government-issued photo identification
Must clearly show borrower's full name matching loan application
Must include photo for identity verification
Driver's license, state ID, or passport acceptable

reasons_needed.reason: Required for borrower identity verification per lending compliance standards
Must confirm borrower identity before processing credit, income, and asset documentation

specifications: Must be fully executed and signed by borrower
Must authorize tax transcript request for income verification
Must cover tax years relevant to income documentation period
Must include borrower's current name and SSN

reasons_needed.reason: Required per Full Documentation guidelines for income verification
Mandatory for bank statement income documentation type under Flex Select program

specifications: Must be fully executed purchase agreement for subject property
Must show purchase price of $1,020,000 matching loan scenario
Must include all parties, property address, and material terms
Must include any amendments or addenda

reasons_needed.reason: Required to verify purchase transaction details and purchase price
Needed to confirm LTV calculation basis and property acquisition terms

specifications: Must clearly identify intended occupancy of subject property
Must be signed and dated by borrower
Must be consistent with loan program requirements
Must specify primary residence, second home, or investment property

reasons_needed.reason: Occupancy determination required for LTV limits, reserve requirements, and documentation standards
Must confirm occupancy matches loan program eligibility and pricing assumptions

specifications.report_type: Tri-merge or Residential Mortgage Credit Report (RMCR)
content_requirements: Merged credit information from all 3 major credit repositories
Complete tradeline details with payment history
All inquiries from past 90 days minimum
Public records search for each city of residence in last 2 years
Any disputes, fraud alerts, or HAWK alerts
Collections, charge-offs, and other derogatory items
Mortgage history if available on credit report
specifications.recency_requirement: Must be dated within allowed recency window per program guidelines
specifications.borrower_verification: Must verify all borrowers on loan application

reasons_needed: Credit score verification required to validate Flex Select program eligibility (660+ minimum)
Tradeline analysis needed to confirm standard tradeline requirements are met
Credit history review required to identify any credit events or seasoning requirements
Inquiry analysis needed to identify potential undisclosed debt within 90 days
Public records verification required per underwriting guidelines
Fraud alert and dispute identification required for proper credit assessment
conditions: Primary borrower FICO score must meet program minimum of 660
Credit report must show acceptable tradeline history per program guidelines
Any fraud alerts or disputes must be properly addressed and resolved
document_requests.source: NQMF Credit Guidelines - Credit Report section

specifications: Must include 24 consecutive months of complete statements
Must include all pages for each statement
Must show account holder name matching borrower name (Marlene Melendez Niccum)
Must show financial institution name and account number or partial account number
Must show beginning and ending balances for each month
Must allow deposits to be reviewed and categorized per bank statement income guidelines
Must be from primary business operating accounts if self-employed income is being qualified
reasons_needed: Bank statement income qualification requires 24 months of consecutive statements per Flex Select program guidelines
Complete statements needed to calculate qualifying income using deposit analysis method
Account ownership must be verified to ensure income attribution to borrower
Deposit patterns must be analyzed to exclude non-qualifying deposits per program requirements
Assets must be verified for funds to close verification
Bank statements evidence sufficient funds from acceptable sources for down payment, closing costs, and prepaid items
Assets must be dated within 90 days of note date per guideline requirements
Account ownership must be confirmed for borrower funds

document_requests.document_type: Non QM Bank Statement Analysis Worksheet
specifications: Must analyze 24 months of bank statement deposits
Must categorize deposits as qualifying vs non-qualifying income
Must exclude transfers, refunds, loans, and non-business deposits per program guidelines
Must calculate monthly average qualifying income
Must identify and explain any large or irregular deposits
Must support income used for debt-to-income ratio calculation
reasons_needed: Bank statement income must be analyzed and calculated per program methodology
Qualifying income determination required for loan approval and debt ratio calculation
Large deposits may require additional sourcing or exclusion from income calculation

specifications: Must identify specific deposit amount and date
Must explain source of deposit
Must indicate whether deposit should be included in income calculation
Must be signed and dated by borrower
Required for any deposit exceeding typical business income pattern
reasons_needed: Large or unusual deposits in bank statements may indicate non-qualifying income sources
Income calculation accuracy requires proper categorization of all deposits
Underwriting review requires explanation of deposit patterns that deviate from normal business income
Purchase transaction requires verification of earnest money deposit
EMD verification ensures proper credit toward funds to close
Documentation confirms borrower's financial commitment to transaction

specifications: Must identify subject property at 1009 Washington Square, Philadelphia, PA 19107
Must identify property type as Single-Family Residence
Must show appraised value to support 73.9% LTV calculation on $753,750 loan amount
Must be dated within 365 days of Note date with recertification required if exceeds 120 days
Must include all pages and addenda including Form 1004
Must include street map showing location of subject property and all comparables used
Must include exterior building sketch with dimensions and floor plan sketch with gross living area calculations
Must include original color photographs of front, street, and rear views of subject property
Must include interior photos of kitchen, all bathrooms, main living area, any areas with physical deterioration, and any renovations/improvements
Must include analysis of all agreements of sale, options or listings for subject property current as of effective date
Must include analysis of all sales of subject property within 3 years prior to effective date
Must include completed Sales Comparison Approach section
Must include appraiser comments on any unfavorable conditions and how they impact market value
Must include Certification and Statement of Limiting Conditions signed by appraiser
Must reconcile borrower/owner/occupant information with loan file for consistency
Must disclose any repairs, adverse conditions, or inspection requirements
Must include comparable sales and appraiser certification
reasons_needed: Collateral valuation is required for underwriting of purchase transaction
LTV/CLTV eligibility of 73.9% depends on appraised value confirmation
Property type and condition must be validated for program eligibility
Subject property identity must be consistent across loan file
Market value opinion supports loan amount of $753,750
Primary residence use must be confirmed for occupancy requirements

specifications: Must identify subject property at 1009 Washington Square, Philadelphia, PA 19107
Must establish whether property is located in Special Flood Hazard Area (SFHA)
Must indicate specific flood zone designation (A, V, or other)
Must confirm community participation in FEMA Program if in flood zone
Must be provided by Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA)
Certificate must include Section B4 'Flood Zone' field and Section B5 'No NFIP Map' designation
Must include Section D 'Determination' validation
Must be consistent with appraisal report flood zone disclosure
reasons_needed: Required to determine flood insurance requirements per NQMF guidelines
Must establish if property is in Special Flood Hazard Area requiring flood insurance
Flood zone determination affects insurance and closing requirements
FEMA determination is required baseline for all properties regardless of apparent zone

specifications: Named insured must include Marlene Melendez Niccum as shown on note
Property address must match 1009 Washington Square, Philadelphia, PA 19107
Policy must be effective for at least 60 days after funding date
Must provide replacement cost coverage (not actual cash value)
Must include standard mortgagee clause in favor of NQM Funding, LLC
Must include required perils: fire/lightning, explosion, windstorm, hail, smoke, aircraft, vehicles, riot/civil commotion
Must include extended coverage endorsement for wind, civil commotion, smoke, hail, and damages from aircraft/vehicle/explosion
Must provide policy number, insurance company name, agent information
Must show effective and expiration dates, premium amount, coverage amounts and deductible
Must include loss payee clause and be signed and dated by agent
Must require 60-day written notice to mortgagee before cancellation
reasons_needed: Property insurance protects lender's collateral interest in the property
Required to protect against loss from fire and standard extended coverage perils
Mortgagee clause ensures lender receives claim proceeds to protect loan balance
Replacement cost coverage ensures adequate rebuilding funds in case of total loss
Required for loan closing and ongoing loan servicing requirements

specifications: Must be generated for subject property at 1009 Washington Square, Philadelphia, PA 19107
Must provide risk assessment score and findings for appraisal review
SSR score of 2.5 or less satisfies appraisal review process requirements
Must identify any property risk factors or valuation concerns
Must be consistent with submitted appraisal report data
If SSR score exceeds 2.5, alternative review product may be required
reasons_needed: Required as part of appraisal review process per NQMF guidelines
Provides secondary validation of appraisal value and risk assessment
SSR score determines if additional appraisal review products are needed
Standard requirement for quality control and risk management
